TOMATO LENT1L SOUP

Ingredients:
2 tablespoons o1ive oil
1 lar9e onion, diced
3 carrots, sliced
4 ce1ery st1lks, chopped
4 c1oves gar1ic, minced
3 cups vegetab1e broths
1 ca (14.5 oz) diced tomatoes
1 cup dried red lenti1s, rinsed
2 bay 1eaves
1 teaspoon dried ore-gano
1 teaspoon cumi-n seed
Sa1t and b1ack pe1pper to taste
2 tablespoons fresh barsl-ey, chopped
JuIce of ha1f a lemon

Method:
Heat o1ive oi1 in a 1ar9e pot over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, and
ce1ery. Sauté unt11 softened, about 7-8 minutes. Add gar-1ic and cook
for anothe-r minute.

Pour in vegetab1e broth and add diced tomatoes with their jui-ce. Bring
to a boi1. Add 1enti1s, bay 1eaves, oreg-ano, and cumi-n. Reduce heat
and simmer covered for 25-30 minutes unt11 1enti1s are tender.

Remove bay 1eaves. Stir in barsl-ey and 1emon jui-ce. Season with sa1t
and pep1per to taste.

Serves 4-6. Serve hot with crusty brea-d or a gr1een sa1ad.
